title: Thiruarimeya Vinnagaram

overview.short: Thiruarimeya Vinnagaram or Kudamadukoothan Perumal Temple is dedicated to Hindu god Vishnu located in Tirunangur, a village in the outskirts of Sirkaḻi in the South Indian state of
overview.description: Thiruarimeya Vinnagaram or Kudamadukoothan Perumal Temple is dedicated to Hindu god Vishnu located in Tirunangur, a village in the outskirts of Sirkaḻi in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Kudamudakoothan and his consort Lakshmi as Amirtagadavalli. It is one among the eleven Divya Desams of Tirunangur Tirupatis and is closely

topPlaces.name: Annan Koil
topPlaces.description: Annan Koil is a village near Sirkazhi in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, (South India). The village is irrigated by the river Kaveri which flows into the Bay Of Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Thiruvanpurushothamam
topPlaces.description: The Purushotama Perumal Temple is located in Thirunangur, a village in the outskirts of Sirkazhi in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, and is dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Purushottaman and his consort Lakshmi as Purushottama Nayagi.

topPlaces.name: Thirumanimadam
topPlaces.description: Thirumanimadam or Narayanan Perumal Temple (also called Badrinarayana Perumal Temple) is dedicated to Hindu god Vishnu located in Thirunangur, a village in the outskirts of Sirkazhi in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Narayanan and his consort Lakshmi as Pundarikavalli.

topPlaces.name: Nathan Kovil
topPlaces.description: Nathan Kovil or Thiru Nandipura Vinnagaram Temple in Nathan Kovil, a village in the outskirts of Kumbakonam in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Jagannathan and his consort Lakshmi as Shenbagavalli.

topPlaces.name: Thiruvaikunda Vinnagaram

It is one of the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Vaikuntanathan and his consort Lakshmi as Vaikuntavalli.

topPlaces.name: Thiruchsemponsey
topPlaces.description: Thiruchsemponsey or Perarulaalan Perumal Temple is dedicated to Hindu god Vishnu located in Thirunangur, a village in the outskirts of Sirkazhi in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries AD. It is one of the 108 Divya Desam dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Peralulalan and his consort Lakshmi as Allimalar Nachiyar.

topPlaces.name: Thiruthetriyambalam

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thiruarimeya Vinnagaram?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thiruarimeya Vinnagaram is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thiruarimeya Vinnagaram?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (125 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (126 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thiruarimeya Vinnagaram?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thiruarimeya Vinnagaram at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thiruarimeya Vinnagaram?
faq.a: Stays in Thiruarimeya Vinnagaram start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thiruarimeya Vinnagaram?
faq.a: The top attractions are Annan Koil, Thiruvanpurushothamam, Thirumanimadam, Nathan Kovil, Thiruvaikunda Vinnagaram.
